post.title: Why Sept cut odds are still high? - Intraday post (15/Aug)
post.subtitle: Debt burden, Treasury issuance, Recession odds, OpEx
post.description: Debt burden, Treasury issuance, Recession odds, OpEx
post.truncated_body_text: Core PPI come out quite hot confirming sticky inflationary pressures and tariff effects as we expected since April/May. PPI feeds into PCE more directly than CPI. Producer prices, especially trade services margins and core goods, tend to lead consumer inflation with a lag (weeks to a few months).
